brief.targetAudience: people who want switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: Coffee switchers have a specific friction point — jitters, crashes, dependency — and the checklist format directly neutralizes each objection with a clean, credible benefit.
copyOptions.visual_description: A soft two-tone gradient background transitions smoothly from muted sage green on the left to near-white on the right, evoking a calm, natural wellness aesthetic. The Organica Tulsi Green Tea stand-up pouch is positioned on the left half at a gentle outward angle, its earthy kraft-toned packaging crisp and fully legible, casting a soft diffused shadow on the gradient surface below. Studio-quality lighting is even and airy, keeping the entire frame in sharp focus with no harsh shadows — the right half remains open and typographically clean.
headlines: Ditch The Jitters. Keep The Ritual.
Feel Good From The First Sip.
subheadlines: Organica Tulsi Green Tea gives you steady, natural energy — no crash, no anxiety, no regrets.
Gentle on your body, rich in antioxidants — the smarter morning cup you have been waiting for.
Trusted by thousands making the switch — pure tulsi and green tea, nothing else added.
